engines.independent_witness: Apple Vision accurate zh-Hans on fresh 300 DPI PNG

online_version_boundary: No exact online copy of this 2001 compilation edition was established. Academic and official sources below corroborate document identity and stable facts only; they do not replace wording in the scan.

pages.resolution: The scan confirms the 1902 display year, title, four-year 字课 sequence, teaching-method paragraphs and printed page 3. Vision's extra display-year/footer tokens explain most alignment difference; no substantive primary-text correction was accepted.
pages.uncertainty_note: Exact-edition online transcription not found; text may be displayed with scan provenance but remains unavailable to citation-locked AI.

pages.resolution: The scan confirms the 1902 title, 寻常小学堂 and 高等小学堂 course sequences and printed page 4. Punctuation and interpunct spacing are layout variants, not content corrections.

pages.entity: 奏定初等小学堂章程（摘录）
pages.resolution: The scan resolves Vision's 俟人大学堂 as 俟入大学堂 and confirms the title's display year 1904, the Chinese-character subject statement and printed page 5.
pages.uncertainty_note: Sources variously describe the 癸卯章程 by drafting/reign year or Gregorian promulgation year; this record preserves the scan's 1904 display label.

pages.entity: 奏定初等小学堂章程（摘录）—第五节课程表
pages.resolution: The primary HTML table lost cell order. The scan establishes weekly hours as 读经讲经 12 and 中国文字 4 for each of five years; it also confirms 兼授以虚字与实字联缀之法, 按诸实事, and 能感发人者. These readings must be applied only to a separate adjudicated transcript, never by silently overwriting the raw OCR witness.
pages.uncertainty_note: Table requires cell-by-cell adjudicated reconstruction before public full-text release.

online_evidence.publisher: 中国社会科学院大学学报
online_evidence.fact_summary: Corroborates the four-year 字课 sequence in 钦定蒙学堂章程 and the 中国文字 subject statement in 奏定初等小学堂章程.

online_evidence.publisher: 北京师范大学校史研究室
online_evidence.fact_summary: Corroborates the 1902 钦定学堂章程 context and the 1904 promulgation identity of 奏定学堂章程.

online_evidence.publisher: 中华人民共和国教育部
online_evidence.fact_summary: Corroborates the 1904 奏定初等小学堂章程 identity and its place in the history of compulsory education.
Corroborates the weekly 12-hour 读经讲经 and 4-hour 国文/中国文字 pattern in the historical primary-school curriculum table.
